legacy.content:
# Phase 33-02 Summary: Feature-first schema and runtime pack loading
## Completed
1. Added `featureSchema` to `space-vectors` content pack contract. 2. Expanded default `space-vectors.json` with explicit feature definitions and space mappings. 3. Added runtime helpers in engine spaces model: - `getFeatureSchema(overrides?)` - `getSpaceFeatureIds(spaceId, overrides?)` 4. Kept compatibility with existing trait/feature groupings while treating both as feature sets. 5. KAPLAY runtime now loads `spaceVectors` from bundle and supports optional generated thematic-basis overlay. 6. Space Explorer and engine docs updated to runtime pack-based space modeling workflow.
## Verification status
- `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` passed. - `packages/kaplay-demo` build/typecheck could not run in this environment because local `node_modules` are missing (`tsx`/`tsc` not found).
